item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "base='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B'
printf 'DIRECT_CHILDREN\\n'
find \""'$base" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -print | sort
printf '"'FILES\\n'
find \""'$base" -type f -print | sort
printf '"'POLICY_JSON\\n'
sed -n '1,120p' \""'$base/config/policy.json"
printf '"'POLICY_MD_NUMBERED\\n'
nl -ba \""'$base/docs/policy.md"'
